creator: fugnet@bellsouth.net
text:
I have an Asus P4B on which I installed FreeBSD. Later I replaced the mother board with a P4S333. Everything seemed to be working fine, except sysnstall would freeze when probing for devices. If I try to install from scatch, the same thing happens. I have tried using boot disk and booting directly from the CD, but as soon as sysinstall starts probing the computer locks. I have left the machine on for hours when the screen shows up to make sure that the device probe was locked. I have used this board with Linux, Windows ME, and Windows XP. It is very fast and cost about $50 less than a P4B266 (i845D), so I'd like to resolve this issue.

How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD on Asus P4S333 (SiS 645)
